Phishing & Social Engineering Testing | Digital Forensics .company <

Measure Your Human Security Layer

We design realistic phishing campaigns tailored to your industry, company size, and threat profile. Our scenarios replicate actual attack patterns including business email compromise, credential harvesting, and malware delivery.

Program Components

  • Customized email phishing campaigns
  • Spear phishing targeting executives and privileged users
  • Voice phishing (vishing) campaigns
  • SMS phishing (smishing) exercises
  • Physical social engineering and pretexting
  • USB drop testing
  • Baseline measurement and progress tracking
  • Post-campaign security awareness training

Reporting & Metrics

Comprehensive reporting with click rates, credential submission rates, reporting rates, and department-level breakdowns. We track improvement over time and benchmark against industry standards.

>

HERORealistic phishing simulations, vishing campaigns, and social engineering exercises to measure and improve your organization human security layer.

Measure Your Human Security Layer

We design realistic phishing campaigns tailored to your industry, company size, and threat profile. Our scenarios replicate actual attack patterns including business email compromise, credential harvesting, and malware delivery.

Program Components

  • Customized email phishing campaigns
  • Spear phishing targeting executives and privileged users
  • Voice phishing (vishing) campaigns
  • SMS phishing (smishing) exercises
  • Physical social engineering and pretexting
  • USB drop testing
  • Baseline measurement and progress tracking
  • Post-campaign security awareness training

Reporting & Metrics

Comprehensive reporting with click rates, credential submission rates, reporting rates, and department-level breakdowns. We track improvement over time and benchmark against industry standards.

Test Types

  • Email Phishing
  • Spear Phishing
  • Vishing
  • Smishing
  • Physical SE
  • USB Drops

We design realistic phishing campaigns tailored to your industry, company size, and threat profile. Our scenarios replicate actual attack patterns including business email compromise, credential harvesting, and malware delivery.

Program Components

  • Customized email phishing campaigns
  • Spear phishing targeting executives and privileged users
